data.title: Senior Bank Vice President Uses False Documents To Defraud Employer Out of $411,923 in a Scheme Spanning Six Years
data.description:
A former bank executive has just pleaded guilty to stealing hundreds of thousands of dollars from her employer. Amy Jo Reid stole $411,923 when she was working as a senior vice president and the director of purchasing for an unnamed bank in Green Bay, Wisconsin, according to court documents obtained by Fox11.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/28/senior-bank-vice-president-uses-false-documents-to-defraud-employer-out-of-411923-in-a-scheme-spanning-six-years/

data.title: Woman Loses $20,000 Life Savings at Wells Fargo After Receiving Inquiry From Scammers Claiming To Be Bank’s Fraud Department: Report
data.description:
Scammers posing as Wells Fargo’s fraud representatives reportedly stole one woman’s life savings from her bank account. Roberta Thompson, a school bus driver in Katy, Texas, says her troubles began when she received a text from someone she believed was with the Wells Fargo fraud department, reports Fox26 Houston.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/28/woman-loses-20000-in-life-savings-from-wells-fargo-account-after-receiving-text-from-scammers-claiming-to-be-the-banks-fraud-department-report/

data.title: Kazakhstan Launches Central Asia’s First Web3 Economic Zone with Solana
data.description:
Catenaa, Saturday, June 28, 2025-Kazakhstan unveiled the Solana Economic Zone Kazakhstan (SEZ KZ), marking Central Asia’s first Web3-focused economic zone, during the 2025 Astana International Forum. Backed by the Solana Foundation, the initiative aims to accelerate blockchain innovation and digital economy growth in the region. The SEZ KZ, built on the Solana blockchain, will act […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/kazakhstan-launches-central-asias-first-web3-economic-zone-with-solana

data.title: Binance Alpha Launches Rekt (REKT), Airdrop Open to Users With 170+ Points
data.description:
Binance Alpha has officially launched Rekt (REKT), and eligible users can now claim part of the 140,230,000 REKT token airdrop through the Alpha event page. The airdrop is available on a first-come, first-served basis for users holding at least 170 Binance Alpha points. Claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Alpha points, and users must confirm their participation on the event page within 24 hours of the token's trading launch. Any unclaimed tokens after the deadline will be forfeited
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/26232679439586?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: LBank Integrates TradingView to Boost Crypto Charting Tools
data.description:

The collaboration brings TradingView’s market-leading visualization suite to LBank’s 15 million users across 210 countries. The upgrade allows users to apply […]
